summary:
Lua 5.3 came with a nice UTF-8 support library internally boundled.
This is that same library packaged as a standalone library, which can be used by any version of Lua (5.1, 5.2 and LuaJIT).
Copyright (C) 1994-2015 Lua.org, PUC-Rio, 2015 LOVE Development Team.
raw_content:
Lua 5.3 came with a nice UTF-8 support library internally boundled.
This is that same library packaged as a standalone library, which can be used by any version of Lua (5.1, 5.2 and LuaJIT).
Copyright (C) 1994-2015 Lua.org, PUC-Rio, 2015 LOVE Development Team.
